title: Claude Code ↔ OpenCode Configuration Parity (central qz-ai-environment repo + symlinks)

tasks.title: Init qz-ai-environment git repo and base layout
tasks.description: Create ~/qz-ai-environment (git init) with shared/{rules,skills,docs}, claude/, opencode/, scripts/, README.md stub. Test: validate.sh layout check asserts base dirs exist.

tasks.title: Write bootstrap-symlinks.sh (backup + idempotent)
tasks.description: scripts/bootstrap-symlinks.sh links ~/.claude and ~/.config/opencode entries into the central repo. MUST back up any real file with a timestamp BEFORE replacing it, print the backup path, and be idempotent. Test: re-run is a no-op; backup created when a real file is present (AC-1.2, AC-1.3).

tasks.title: Write validate.sh symlink-integrity check
tasks.description: scripts/validate.sh resolves every bootstrap symlink and exits non-zero listing broken/missing targets. Test: inject a broken link → non-zero + name printed (AC-1.4).

tasks.title: Extract tool-agnostic rules into shared/rules
tasks.description: Move the format-agnostic engineering rules (body of global + project CLAUDE.md) into shared/rules/ as the single source. Test: parity assertion that shared/rules is referenced by both wrappers.

tasks.title: Wrapper AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md via native include (OQ-3)
tasks.description: AGENTS.md = OpenCode preamble + instructions[] globbing shared/rules/*.md; CLAUDE.md = Claude preamble + @shared/rules imports. NO generator, NO duplication of the rule body. Test: OpenCode loads rules; both wrappers reference shared/rules (AC-2.1, AC-2.3).

tasks.title: Port Gentleman persona into OpenCode
tasks.description: Capture the Gentleman output-style (Spanish voseo chat, English code/artifacts) in AGENTS.md or the default agent prompt. Test: persona section present and reflected in a sample reply (AC-2.2).

tasks.title: Translate MCP servers into opencode.json mcp{}
tasks.description: Translate the ~27 Claude MCP servers into the mcp{} block (local/remote, command, enabled). Test: opencode.json schema-valid; each server declared; auth servers (vercel, neon, mercadopago, socket) non-blocking (AC-4.1, AC-4.2).

tasks.title: Map per-agent tool scoping in opencode.json
tasks.description: Express per-agent tool enable/disable (tools{}/agent{}) mirroring Claude agent tool restrictions. Test: restricted-tool agent reflected in config (AC-4.3).

tasks.title: Translate permissions into OpenCode permission{}
tasks.description: Map Claude allow/deny/ask sets into OpenCode permission{} (edit, bash, skill, webfetch). Test: equivalent rules apply (AC-5.1).

tasks.title: Enforce branch protection (no push main/staging)
tasks.description: Express the deny of git push to main/staging in OpenCode (permission rule or plugin). Test: push to main/staging blocked (AC-5.2).

tasks.title: Schema-validate opencode.json in validate.sh
tasks.description: Validate opencode.json against https://opencode.ai/config.json in validate.sh. Test: invalid opencode.json makes validate.sh fail (won't-start guard).

tasks.title: Write gen-agents.sh generator (reusable)
tasks.description: Reusable generator that turns a neutral agent source into per-tool frontmatter (used by central user-global agents AND hospeda F6). Test: a sample agent produces valid Claude + OpenCode frontmatter.

tasks.title: Migrate user-global agents (jd-*) to central
tasks.description: Migrate the 3 user-global jd-* agents (jd-fix-agent, jd-judge-a, jd-judge-b) to central claude/agents + opencode/agent. Hospeda project agents are F6. Test: each loads in both tools (AC-3.1).

tasks.title: Migrate user-global command (handoff) to central
tasks.description: Migrate the user-global handoff command to central claude/commands + opencode/command. Hospeda project commands are F6. Test: command resolves args in both tools (AC-3.2).

tasks.title: Wire user-global skills to central
tasks.description: Wire any user-global ~/.claude skills into central shared/skills + both tools. (Most skills are hospeda project-level -> F6.) Test: each user-global skill listed with permission (AC-3.3).

tasks.title: Write parity-check.sh
tasks.description: scripts/parity-check.sh asserts every Claude agent/command/skill has an OpenCode peer and flags divergent-pair drift. Test: removing a peer fails listing the gap (AC-3.4, drift mitigation).

tasks.title: Plugin scaffolding + fail-safe wrapper + test harness
tasks.description: Set up opencode/plugin/ with a shared fail-safe wrapper (catch+log non-security; security fails closed) + bun/vitest harness. Test: a throwing plugin does not abort the tool call (AC-6.6).

tasks.title: validate-bash plugin (tool.execute.before)
tasks.description: Reimplement validate-bash as a tool.execute.before plugin blocking forbidden paths (.env, node_modules, build/, dist/, .git/, secrets). Security: fail closed. Test: blocked path rejected (AC-6.1).

tasks.title: rtk rewrite plugin (tool.execute.before)
tasks.description: Reimplement rtk token-economy rewrite as a tool.execute.before plugin; must NOT rewrite git log (and other exclusions). Test: rewrite applied; git log untouched (AC-6.2).

tasks.title: Session/tab title plugin (session.created)
tasks.description: Reimplement session/tab titles as a plugin on session.created (+TUI events) deriving 'SPEC-NNN slug' from the git branch. Test: title derived from branch (AC-6.3).

tasks.title: remember plugin (message/idle → .remember)
tasks.description: Reimplement remember passive history capture as a plugin on message.updated/session.idle, appending to .remember/. Test: history appended (AC-6.5).

tasks.title: engram: run `engram setup opencode` + verify (OQ-1)
tasks.description: Run `engram setup opencode` (installs official engram.ts + MCP entry + statusline). Confirm shared server :7437 and DB ~/.engram/engram.db. Do NOT centralize engram.ts (third-party). Test: mem_search from OpenCode returns shared history; autosave fires on compaction; graceful degrade if server down (AC-6.4).

tasks.title: Port /spec and /task-master:* as OpenCode commands
tasks.description: Expose task-master slash commands as OpenCode commands invoking the same bash scripts (resolve-paths, scan-spec-numbers, etc.). Test: a ported command invokes the scripts correctly (AC-7.1).

tasks.title: Verify SDD flow end-to-end from OpenCode
tasks.description: Create a throwaway spec from OpenCode and confirm allocation + index-sync + artifacts match Claude Code output. Test: artifacts equal those from Claude flow (AC-7.2).

tasks.title: Port task-master subagents to OpenCode agents
tasks.description: Port spec-writer, task-planner, tech-analyzer subagents to OpenCode agents. Test: OpenCode delegates to each equivalent (AC-7.3).

tasks.title: Spike: OpenCode programmatic subagent/tool API
tasks.description: Determine whether an OpenCode plugin/custom-tool can SPAWN and COORDINATE subagents programmatically (the prerequisite for a Workflow-style runner). Produce a design decision: full runner vs constrained fallback. Resolves AC-8.1; de-risks the orchestration build.

tasks.title: Implement orchestration runner core (agent/parallel/pipeline)
tasks.description: Implement the runner core per the T-026 design: deterministic primitives agent(), parallel() (barrier), pipeline() (no-barrier multi-stage) over OpenCode subagents. Test: each primitive runs a trivial multi-agent case (AC-8.2).

tasks.title: Implement advanced orchestration patterns
tasks.description: Add loop-until, adversarial-verify (multi-judge majority vote), and schema-validated structured output to the runner. Test: each pattern works on a sample (AC-8.3).

tasks.title: Worked orchestration example + parity-gap doc
tasks.description: Write one end-to-end orchestration example using the runner, and a parity-gap doc stating where it diverges from the Claude Code Workflow tool (token-budget caching, deterministic vs model-driven spawn). Test: the example runs end-to-end (AC-8.4, AC-8.5).

tasks.title: F0 smoke: OpenCode boots with rules+MCP+permissions
tasks.description: Smoke test that OpenCode launches and loads rules, MCP servers, and permissions from central config. Test: boot + sanity command succeeds (AC-2.1, AC-4.1, AC-5.1).

tasks.title: Wire validate.sh CI-style gate
tasks.description: Combine symlink-integrity + opencode.json schema validation + parity-check into one validate.sh gate runnable pre-commit. Test: passes on good state, fails on each injected fault.

tasks.title: Plugin unit-test suite green
tasks.description: Ensure plugin unit tests (validate-bash, rtk, titles, remember, engram-extra-autosave) pass under bun/vitest. The official engram.ts is third-party (its own tests). Test: suite green; blocked/allowed/degraded paths covered.

tasks.title: Orchestration runner tests
tasks.description: Unit/integration tests for the orchestration runner: primitives (agent/parallel/pipeline) + advanced patterns (loop-until, verify-vote, structured output). Test: suite green (AC-8.4).

tasks.title: README: layout, bootstrap, validation, edit flows
tasks.description: Document central repo layout, bootstrap usage, validation, and edit-shared vs edit-divergent workflows so a future session reproduces it.

tasks.title: Rollback runbook + parity-gap notes
tasks.description: Write the cutover rollback runbook (restore backup) and consolidated parity-gap notes (Workflow runner divergences, rtk integrity absence). Supports AC-9.3.

tasks.title: Cutover: backup ~/.claude and convert to symlinks
tasks.description: Final cutover (F5): back up ~/.claude, then convert its entries to symlinks into the central repo. Prereq: all validation green. Test: backup exists before any link replaces a file (AC-9.2).

tasks.title: Post-cutover smoke for Claude Code
tasks.description: After cutover, verify Claude Code still loads rules, runs a command, and a hook fires; if broken, apply the rollback runbook. Test: post-cutover smoke passes (AC-9.2, AC-9.3).

tasks.title: engram extra-autosave plugin (frequent saves, ours)
tasks.description: Replicate the custom Claude `engram-autosave.sh` behavior in OpenCode as a SEPARATE owned plugin (NOT modifying the third-party engram.ts): on session.idle (throttled — only after N new messages or X minutes) and on session end, extract learnings from the transcript with a cheap model and POST to engram's :7437/observations/passive. Fail-safe: degrade silently if engram is down; anti-recursion guard so the extractor model call doesn't re-trigger. This plugin IS centralized (ours). Test: throttled idle triggers a save; session-end triggers a save; engram-down degrades without crashing (extends AC-6.4 / new AC-6.7).

tasks.title: Hospeda: scaffold .ai/ neutral source + generator skeleton
tasks.description: In the HOSPEDA repo (own branch off staging), create .ai/{rules,skills,agents,commands} neutral source and scripts/gen-ai-config.sh skeleton that will emit .claude/ and .opencode/. Reuses the central gen-agents approach (T-012). Test: skeleton runs and reports planned outputs (AC-10.1).

tasks.title: Hospeda: agents .ai/agents -> generate .claude + .opencode
tasks.description: Move the 20 hospeda agents into .ai/agents (canonical) and generate per-tool .claude/agents and .opencode/agent as real committed files. Test: each agent present and well-formed for both tools (AC-10.4).

tasks.title: Hospeda: commands .ai/commands -> generate .claude + .opencode
tasks.description: Move the 18 hospeda commands into .ai/commands and generate per-tool command files ($ARGUMENTS/$1..n for OpenCode). Test: a command with args resolves in both tools (AC-10.4).

tasks.title: Hospeda: skills .ai/skills shared by both tools
tasks.description: Move the 34 hospeda skills into .ai/skills (same format both tools) and wire Claude skills dir + OpenCode skill config via relative in-repo paths (no per-tool duplication). Test: each skill listed in both tools (AC-10.3).

tasks.title: Hospeda: rules .ai/rules + per-tool wrappers
tasks.description: Put the hospeda project rule body in .ai/rules; generate/keep CLAUDE.md (@import) and add AGENTS.md (OpenCode) including it via relative paths. Test: both tools load hospeda project rules (AC-10.1, AC-10.3).

tasks.title: Hospeda: .opencode/opencode.json project config
tasks.description: Create hospeda .opencode/opencode.json: instructions -> .ai/rules (relative), skill config, protected-branches deny (from T-010 template), any project MCP. Test: opencode.json valid + branch-protection deny present (AC-10.1).

tasks.title: Hospeda: generator idempotency + drift check
tasks.description: Make gen-ai-config.sh idempotent (re-run = no diff) and add a drift check that fails if .claude/.opencode were hand-edited (regenerate-and-compare). Wire into CI/pre-commit doc. Test: no-change re-run is clean; hand edit fails the check (AC-10.5).

tasks.title: Hospeda: generator tests + parity check
tasks.description: Tests for gen-ai-config.sh + a parity check that every .ai source has both tool outputs and a future-tool target is one addition. Test: suite green; parity passes (AC-10.2, AC-10.6).

tasks.title: Hospeda: AI-config README (.ai/ + generator + add-a-tool)
tasks.description: Document how .ai/ + the generator work, how to edit config, and how to add a new tool target. Test: README covers edit + add-tool flows (AC-10.6).
